retrospective.harder_than_needed: The two examiner-flagged gaps (VQ-S4-016, VQ-S4-017) were both coverage gaps in a test file rather than product bugs, but closing VQ-S4-016 required tracing joinRequestSender.ts's rawPublish() to confirm a reliable, non-flaky in-app failure trigger existed (context.setOffline(true) racing a fresh per-relay WebSocket, which fails via ws.onerror or the function's own 10s per-relay timeout either way) before committing to the test rather than guessing at one.
